title: dactylorhiza maculata subsp. meyeri
intro: Dactylorhiza maculata subsp. meyeri, also known as the spotted orchid or marsh orchid, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the orchid family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Dactylorhiza maculata subsp. meyeri include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory function, and boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, tinctures, or infusions, which are often used to treat respiratory issues, as well as to promote overall well-being.
